Body: A 404 from the upstream provider means the release tag does not exist there — that is permanent, not transient. We must not absorb it into codes.Unavailable, or Day-0 bootstrap retries a guaranteed-404 forever. Classify a definitive absence as NotFound.

Do not widen applyGraceWindow to paper this over. The running-vs-installed hash is the authoritative drift signal; the apply-time check is only the timing tell and must never override the hash to assert drift it doesn't support.
The installed-state file must not be world-readable — always chmod 0640. A looser mode lets a stale unit regression create a ghost node on rejoin.

Heartbeat is an observer — it must never overwrite a build_id-bearing record committed by the controller via ConvergenceResultV1. Always skip records that already carry a build_id; local discovery cannot reproduce that identity.
